mdSummary:
# DateTimePicker

Combined date + time picker with timezone awareness.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Specialized
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/date-time-picker

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| DateTimePicker | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| DateTimePicker | Required | `bool` | `` |  |
| DateTimePicker | Invalid | `bool` | `` |  |
| DateTimePicker | ErrorText | `string?` | `` |  |
| DateTimePicker | HelperText | `string?` | `` |  |
| DateTimePicker | Label | `string?` | `` |  |
| DateTimePicker | Name | `string?` | `` |  |
| DateTimePicker | Value | `DateTime?` | `` |  |
| DateTimePicker | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<DateTime?>` | `` |  |
| DateTimePicker | Use24Hour | `bool` | `true` |  |
| DateTimePicker | ShowSeconds | `bool` | `` |  |
| DateTimePicker | DateFormat | `string?` | `` | Date portion format. When null (default) falls back to the effective culture's ShortDatePattern. |
| DateTimePicker | Placeholder | `string?` | `` |  |
| DateTimePicker | Culture | `System.Globalization.CultureInfo?` | `` | Overrides CurrentCulture for date/time formatting. Leave null to honour ASP.NET request localization. |
| DateTimePicker | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| DateTimePicker | Clearable | `bool` | `` |  |
| DateTimePicker | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| DateTimePicker | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<DateTime?>`)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<DateTimePicker />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-input`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--radius`

- `UI/DateTimePicker/DateTimePicker.razor`
